sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Olympiodorus</hi> Philosophus [Olymp.] <date TEIform="date">vi A.D.</date> <title_ TEIform="title">in Alc. = in Platonis Alcibiadem commentarii,</title_> ed. F. Creuzer, Frankfurt 1820-25. <title_ TEIform="title">in Cat. = in Categorias commentarium,</title_> ed. A. Busse (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> i), Berlin 1902. <title_ TEIform="title">in Grg. = in Platonis Gorgiam commentaria,</title_> ed. A. Jahn, in <title_ TEIform="title">Neue Jahrbücher für Philologie, Suppl.</title_> xiv (1848) p. 104. <title_ TEIform="title">in Mete. = in Aristotelis Meteora commentaria,</title_> ed. W. Stüve (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> ii), Berlin 1900. <title_ TEIform="title">in Phd. = in Platonis Phaedonem commentaria,</title_> ed. W. Norvin, Leipzig (T.) 1913. <title_ TEIform="title">in Phlb. = in Platonis Philebum scholia,</title_> ed. G. Stallbaum, in editione Philebi, Leipzig 1820. <title_ TEIform="title">Proll. = Prolegomena,</title_> ed. A. Busse (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> xii </item>
